title: Rich Creamy Australian Coconut Cream Pudding
description: A comforting dessert featuring coconut cream, wrapped in parchment paper and baked in a claypot. This Whole30-friendly dessert is perfect for warm weather.
instructions: Combine coconut cream, coconut sugar, and egg yolks in a blender or food processor.
Blend until smooth and well combined.
Pour mixture into 4-6 ramekins or small claypots.
Place a piece of parchment paper over each ramekin, pressing it onto the surface of the mixture.
Place ramekins in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides of the ramekins.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the edges are set and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove from oven and let cool to room temperature.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
Garnish with unsweetened shredded coconut before serving.
